requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 for PV Inverters — NBSM / NEA Nepal Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——尼泊尔NBSM / NEA要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——尼泊爾NBSM / NEA要求

summary.en: Nepal's EMC requirements for solar PV inverters are addressed through NS (Nepali Standard) adoption of IEC standards, administered by NBSM (Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology). IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and IEC 61000-3-2 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions) are the relevant IEC benchmarks adopted or referenced in Nepal's NS framework for PV inverters. NEA connection rules for grid-tied inverters reference harmonic emission limits consistent with IEC 61000-3-2. No standalone Nepal-specific EMC technical regulation exclusively for solar inverters has been confirmed; EMC requirements for Nepal PV inverters derive from NS / IEC adoption and NEA's grid-connection technical conditions. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment and is the expected evidence baseline for compliant grid-tied inverters.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔太阳能光伏逆变器的EMC要求通过NS（尼泊尔标准）采纳IEC标准来处理，由NBSM（尼泊尔标准与计量局）管理。IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（电磁兼容——谐波电流排放限值）是尼泊尔NS框架为光伏逆变器采纳或引用的相关IEC基准。NEA并网逆变器接入规则引用与IEC 61000-3-2一致的谐波排放限值。目前尚未确认存在专门针对太阳能逆变器的独立尼泊尔EMC技术法规；尼泊尔光伏逆变器的EMC要求源自NS / IEC采纳及NEA并网技术条件。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准，是合规并网逆变器的预期证据基准。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾太陽能光伏逆變器的EMC要求通過NS（尼泊爾標準）採納IEC標準來處理，由NBSM（尼泊爾標準與計量局）管理。IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（電磁相容——諧波電流排放限值）是尼泊爾NS框架為光伏逆變器採納或引用的相關IEC基準。NEA併網逆變器接入規則引用與IEC 61000-3-2一致的諧波排放限值。目前尚未確認存在專門針對太陽能逆變器的獨立尼泊爾EMC技術法規；尼泊爾光伏逆變器的EMC要求源自NS / IEC採納及NEA併網技術條件。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，是合規併網逆變器的預期證據基準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (adopted or referenced via NS / IEC framework by NBSM)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase) (referenced in NEA grid-connection technical conditions)
NBSM NS standards — Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology, adopting IEC standards as Nepali Standards (NS)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods used in Chinese domestic standards, the GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as required for Nepal NS / IEC conformity. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for NBSM NS conformity assessment or NEA project submissions.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了中国国内标准中使用的IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用限值未与IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调，不符合尼泊尔NS / IEC合格评定要求。仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被接受为NBSM NS合格评定或NEA项目提交的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了中國國內標準中使用的IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用限值未與IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調，不符合尼泊爾NS / IEC合格評定要求。僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被接受為NBSM NS合格評定或NEA項目提交的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy Nepal's NS / IEC-based IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model. These reports should be specific to the power rating and configuration of the inverter being supplied to Nepal. Where harmonics test results were obtained under Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V), consider whether retesting under Nepal grid conditions (230/400 V, 50 Hz) is required by the NBSM conformity assessor or NEA project engineer.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足尼泊尔NS / IEC依据的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖所供应特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。上述报告应针对供应至尼泊尔的逆变器功率等级和配置。若谐波测试结果在中国电网条件（220/380 V）下获取，应与NBSM合格评定机构或NEA项目工程师确认是否需要在尼泊尔电网条件（230/400 V、50 Hz）下重新测试。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足尼泊爾NS / IEC依據的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋所供應特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。上述報告應針對供應至尼泊爾的逆變器功率等級和配置。若諧波測試結果在中國電網條件（220/380 V）下取得，應與NBSM合格評定機構或NEA項目工程師確認是否需要在尼泊爾電網條件（230/400 V、50 Hz）下重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Required for NBSM NS conformity assessment and NEA grid-connection project submission; IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 are the applicable IEC evidence benchmarks under Nepal's NS adoption framework
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy Nepal's NS / IEC-based IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model before NBSM NS conformity assessment or NEA project submission. Confirm whether Nepal grid voltage conditions (230/400 V) require retesting compared to test results obtained under 220/380 V Chinese grid conditions. Verify current NBSM NS standards adoption status directly at nbsm.gov.np.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足尼泊尔NS / IEC依据的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在进行NBSM NS合格评定或NEA项目提交前，须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请确认尼泊尔电网电压条件（230/400 V）是否需要相较于中国220/380 V电网条件下的测试结果重新测试。请直接在nbsm.gov.np核实现行NBSM NS标准采纳状态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足尼泊爾NS / IEC依據的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在進行NBSM NS合格評定或NEA項目提交前，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請確認尼泊爾電網電壓條件（230/400 V）是否需要相較於中國220/380 V電網條件下的測試結果重新測試。請直接在nbsm.gov.np核實現行NBSM NS標準採納狀態。
